title: pabstiella pauloensis
intro: Pabstiella pauloensis is a type of orchid, a flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally used in folk medicine, Pabstiella pauloensis is said to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
